body:

name: Dr. Ben Carson
subject: A Message from Dr. Carson
body:
Peter,

When speaking to people across the country,
one of the questions I am asked most these days is "why did you
start American Cornerstone Institute?" It's a question I love
answering. America is the greatest country on earth, and it has
been since its founding. It was founded on principles that have
guided us through ups and downs and it has created a country that
has been resilient to anything that was thrown at it.

However, that has changed. Americans are
moving away from the principles that made this country great in
the first place. We need to get America back on track, and the
best way to do that is to make everyone realize the importance of
the cornerstone principles that made us into the country we are
today.

I can't do this alone. This will take all of
us together to realize this vision. If you would like to chip in
$10, $25, $50, or even $100, it would be greatly appreciated.

This is a different kind of think tank. As my
friend Glenn Beck said it's a 'can-do' tank. We will be taking
our ideas to as many places as possible. To the halls of
congress, to grassroots leaders, to communities, and to schools
across the country. This will be a huge endeavor, and it will
take a lot of work, but I'm confident in the American people, and
I'm confident we will make a difference.

Faith. Community. Life. Liberty. These are
the cornerstones this country was founded on. These are the same
cornerstones of the American Cornerstone Institute. As a country,
we've moved away from those core values and we've seen the
devastating effects of that as a culture. It's time to get back
to that. We are at a critical moment in our country.

It's going to require all of our intellect
and all of our resources to save our nation. A donation to this
cause is an investment in our future.

I am very excited about the future of
America. I'm excited about the American Cornerstone Institute. I
hope you can join us as we make a difference in in this country.

Sincerely,

Dr. Ben Carson

name: Mondaire Jones
subject: Why we need the For the People Act
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Mondaire for Congress_
body:
In a democracy, the people choose their politicians, not the other way around.
#

It has been 2 full months since the House passed the For the People Act (H.R. 1) — the landmark bill that would end right-wing gerrymandering of Congressional districts and make it harder to suppress the right to vote.
**This bill would save and strengthen our democracy — and for that reason, Mitch McConnell and dark money Republican groups are working overtime to block the For The People Act and permanently stack the deck in their favor.**
While the bill is stalled in the Senate, we’ve seen Georgia, Texas, and — just this past week — Florida prove to us again why it’s needed by passing bills that go so far as to make it illegal to give out water to voters in hours-long lines. These attacks on voting rights are a slap in the face to all Americans, but particularly the communities of color who are affected the most.
It is agonizing to watch this bill languish on the Senate floor while bad faith actors pretend to make good faith arguments for why we should allow the erosion of our democracy to continue.
We must double down on our resolve to get this bill passed, no matter what it takes, including abolishing the filibuster. In a democracy, the people choose their politicians, not the other way around. That’s true whether Mitch McConnell likes it or not.
Thank you for fighting alongside me on this critical issue. We must save our democracy before it’s too late.
Onward,
Mondaire
Mondaire is working overtime to fight for democracy reform and a long list of other progressive priorities, but he can’t keep up the fight without your support.

clean_body: In a democracy, the people choose their politicians, not the other way around. It has been 2 full months since the House passed the For the People Act (H.R. 1) — the landmark bill that would end right-wing gerrymandering of Congressional districts and make it harder to suppress the right to vote. This bill would save and strengthen our democracy — and for that reason, Mitch McConnell and dark money Republican groups are working overtime to block the For The People Act and permanently stack the deck in their favor. While the bill is stalled in the Senate, we’ve seen Georgia, Texas, and — just this past week — Florida prove to us again why it’s needed by passing bills that go so far as to make it illegal to give out water to voters in hours-long lines. These attacks on voting rights are a slap in the face to all Americans, but particularly the communities of color who are affected the most. It is agonizing to watch this bill languish on the Senate floor while bad faith actors pretend to make good faith arguments for why we should allow the erosion of our democracy to continue. We must double down on our resolve to get this bill passed, no matter what it takes, including abolishing the filibuster. In a democracy, the people choose their politicians, not the other way around. That’s true whether Mitch McConnell likes it or not. Thank you for fighting alongside me on this critical issue. We must save our democracy before it’s too late. Onward, Mondaire Mondaire is working overtime to fight for democracy reform and a long list of other progressive priorities, but he can’t keep up the fight without your support. = = * | | | Paid for by Mondaire for Congress Mondaire For Congress c/o Blue Wave Political Partners 499 S. name: =?utf-8?Q?Amanda=20Makki?=
subject: Gov Check$ to stay home- Bill O'Reilly and I discuss socialism and Op-Ed in the Washington Examiner
body:
| | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/aa70a80a28ee/happy-thanksgiving-from-milwaukee-4786629?e=c2296cffff)
---
| |
---
| | Dear Fellow Patriot,

I hope this email finds you well.

**We all knew this would happen if President Trump was no longer in office and conservatives were no longer in the majority, but did you think it could happen so quickly?**

President Biden is taking our country down the path of _**socialism,**_**** which** ** was in full display last week in his Joint Session to Congress when** he urged lawmakers to spend more, tax more and hurt more small businesses. **
* **Spend More** by urging Congress to enact two more rounds of stimulus, on top of the**$1.9 COVID relief bil** l Democrats just passed, saddling Americans with **$6.35 trillion** in more debt.
* **Tax More** by hiking the corporate tax rate, the top personal rate, and the capital gains so the **_U.S. has __t_ he highest rate of all industrial nations. **
* **Hurt Small Businesses** who are having to compete with the government for workers receiving stimulus and unemployment checks. **Restaurants, ride-sharing and resort/tourism workers, in some cases, are getting paid more to stay home than to work!**
* **_Read my op-ed published in the Washington Examiner on how small businesses in Florida and around the country are struggling to find workers thanks to Democrats' incentives for people to stay home. _**

**_https://www.washingtonexaminer.com/opinion/hiring-signs-everywhere-thanks-to-democratic-incentives-to-stay-home_**

The unfortunate reality is that in the first 100 days of Joe Biden's America, our country has gone from:
* **A secure southern border** **to one that is** **in full crisis **because of Biden's failed open border policies.
* **Stable food prices to 3-5 percent spikes** in the cost of groceries, like eggs and meat
* **Moderate gas prices to a 22 percent increase in the cost of fuel,** which is set to increase **34 percent by July** during the peak of our tourism season.

**__And to think....all this was achieved in Biden's first 100 days!__** _We know why our Founding Fathers had the foresight to have Congressional elections every two years; so that that there is a**check and balance** on our government which is currently lacking in a Democrat-controlled Washington._
**So what's the solution?** Elect conservative candidates in 2022 who can _**win**_ Congressional seats. Period.

**We must regain control of the House and Senate and fire Pelosi and Schumer from their majority leadership positions. **

We are only five seats shy in the House, and one seat shy in the Senate. This MUST be done so we can stop President Biden from spending more, taxing more and hurting our small businesses.
---
| [ ](https://amandamakki.us2.list-manage.com/track/click?u=0e08b08a89872d093efe5d84d&id=9c51d3019b&e=c2296cffff)
---
April 29, 2021- Interview with Bill O'Reilly discussing Biden's spending agenda and how the government is incentivizing workers to stay home.
|

Thank you!
Amanda Makki

name: Michael Whatley
subject: One Vote Short
disclaimer_text: Paid for by North Carolina Republican Party ([nc
body:
We can’t let the Democrats pass DC Statehood.
| Peter, Right now, everyone is talking about “DC Statehood.” It’s a terrible idea, and -- frankly -- just a purely partisan power grab by the Democrats. If they succeed in making the Swamp a State, it’ll likely give them a permanent majority in the United States Senate. And they know it. Right now, the only thing that stands in their way is, surprisingly, a Democrat Senator: Joe Manchin of West Virginia. Manchin opposes DC Statehood, and without his support the Left can’t muscle this power grab through. That’s why it’s SO IMPORTANT that we defend North Carolina’s “open” Senate seat in 2022, Peter. If the Democrats manage to secure a win in North Carolina, it could give them that extra vote they need to ram through this DC Statehood bill. We can’t let that happen! **[That’s why I have to ask: can you donate $35 (or really any amount) right now to help us build the campaign infrastructure we’ll need to win?](https://www.nc.gop/r?u=K115QJUsYIJk1EqYiO2oYoX9ls6uHz6nseaLc9yeOc5gJTrfTj8QMzrK5BHQBzw9132xJEwklWH4fMz_g-vR6ET_oAtFz2fONUZk123wI9X812rp4g3VQoLJsVp16HKJKGj95pQSwPWTu3ptVkMWuMqpRsMPr5aA6nLM7PBGYBld1WSI4uwKxmCGc3DYgYyzZRTau82zzx-nIhBctbXG9y7JD-6ApjRjp1Yy_nFZbsy4lSThYoKgzuW-hnCdgTEcAUiiwpMFiAyc9m_tuCfDZUhdJNLyF6xgHe0p1yqnIuEV1htBGkUnp8wyEOjSOfrU-wNU1a3C8lpTMLMeXweadQ&e=f30dc52ea6b3f0fa359c0052b3984e35&utm_source=ncgop&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=508805960966274699_t&n=1)** | | | [Contribute $35](https://www.nc.gop/r?u=K115QJUsYIJk1EqYiO2oYoX9ls6uHz6nseaLc9yeOc5gJTrfTj8QMzrK5BHQBzw9132xJEwklWH4fMz_g-vR6IvWxrpxWNSPftwM4cYJEgYpXaFFKau5sIWDMr6wHhbnF75QnyZ1HwMr_z379la0Xh77cdf1Gxe_eAg4WG6kRXVIOBa47b3a5WnXAj2Cuv4DxpobnhIY0gZUzcNHvyPblFgNaPxtSIEVy7Um4IP_RQgHJ7pP77TKbqHUbwrCqoPR9aKB5BXx3V-38iYnt8amM264EZKcVMwmZKAiMxFdvej3NKti-so9iS-_cElnK05QFC8Y9fXPzvw-VG-_adFiTuzb5Wy2T7-keoHJESlx10vOCc2bJXxtA1CydmoqwsFr&e=f30dc52ea6b3f0fa359c0052b3984e35&utm_source=ncgop&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=508805960966274699_t&n=2)

clean_body: We can’t let the Democrats pass DC Statehood. | Peter, Right now, everyone is talking about “DC Statehood.” It’s a terrible idea, and -- frankly -- just a purely partisan power grab by the Democrats. If they succeed in making the Swamp a State, it’ll likely give them a permanent majority in the United States Senate. And they know it. Right now, the only thing that stands in their way is, surprisingly, a Democrat Senator: Joe Manchin of West Virginia. Manchin opposes DC Statehood, and without his support the Left can’t muscle this power grab through. That’s why it’s SO IMPORTANT that we defend North Carolina’s “open” Senate seat in 2022, Peter. If the Democrats manage to secure a win in North Carolina, it could give them that extra vote they need to ram through this DC Statehood bill. We can’t let that happen! | | | | | | | | | | Remember: together, we won big in 2020. We secured North Carolina’s Electoral College votes for President Trump, re-elected Senator Tillis, and dealt the Left defeats up and down the ballot. But in 2022, North Carolina is one of the Democrats’ TOP TARGETS. We need to be ready for anything. | | | | | | | | | Thank you. Michael Whatley Chairman, North Carolina Republican Party

http://email.vervemail.com/p/vJz7roOu4N
"This is a special woman who's going to be a great GREAT
Governor."
- President Trump on Sarah Huckabee Sanders

WATCH THE CLIP NOW >>

Peter, the far left may consider us an
enemy…

But we've got a great ally on our side:
President Trump.

Just recently, he was gracious enough to host
an event for our campaign, and this is what he had to say...

WATCH THE CLIP NOW >>

There's no doubt that liberals are taking
note of our campaign's growing strength. They know we have
President Trump on our side, they know we have YOU, and that's
why they've made it their mission to defeat me.

But we're NOT going to let them. That's why
we're announcing an aggressive End-Of-Month fundraising goal to
raise $25,000 before our deadline at 11:59PM on April
30th… And we'll be sharing a list of all our April donors
with President Trump to show him everyone who has become a part
of our grassroots movement this month.

Will you be one of them, Peter? Chip in any
amount below

By donating below, you are making an
immediate contribution:

ONE CLICK DONATE: $100
ONE CLICK DONATE: $75
ONE CLICK DONATE: $50
ONE CLICK DONATE: $25

By donating below, you are making an
immediate contribution:

Peter, as governor, I will defend our
American right to be free of socialism and tyranny, our Second
Amendment right to keep our families safe, and our freedom of
speech and religious liberty.

I will not be intimidated by the serious
challenges we face.

I will stand with our brave law enforcement
officers, promote law and order, and keep our communities safe.

I will fight back against the radical,
socialist policies that threaten to destroy so many jobs, and I
will make the government accountable to the people.

I want to see our nation reward hard work
again and prosper -- to create a better future for our children
and grandchildren.

SUPPORT SARAH FOR GOVERNOR NOW >>

A lot of you already know me: I'm a
Christian. A wife. A mom. A proud Arkansan.

My opponents will do everything in their
power to destroy me, but I will never apologize for who I am or
what I'm fighting for. The reason is simple: I am fighting FOR
YOU.

I will never surrender and bow down to the
radical left. Not now. Not ever.

I will always be on the frontlines of the
fight against the radical, socialist agenda.

But I can't do it without you. That's why we
want you on our side every step of the way. Will you please help
us meet our goal by chipping in today?

MAKE AN URGENT DONATION NOW >>

We really hope you do.

Thank you for your time, Peter.

Sarah Huckabee Sanders

Paid for by Sarah for
Governor

This email was
sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com

Unsubscribe

Arkansas law limits contributions to $5,600
per election cycle. Each individual, political party committee,
legislative caucus committee or approved political action
committee may contribute up to $2,800 for the primary election
and $2,800 for the general election -- for a total of $5,600.

Corporate contributions are not permissible.

Contributions are not tax deductible for
Federal income tax purposes. Individuals may take a tax credit on
Arkansas tax returns, up to a total of $50 per individual for
political contributions made each year.
Contributions from foreign nationals are
prohibited by law.
State law requires that we collect and report
name, address, employer and occupation for each contributor.

name: Greater Georgia
subject: ICYMI: KELLY LOEFFLER JOINS MARTHA ZOLLER'S RADIO SHOW
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Greater Georgia Action, Inc
body:
---
| | | | | |
---
| FOR IMMEDIATE RELEASE MONDAY, MAY 3, 2021
ICYMI: KELLY LOEFFLER JOINS MARTHA ZOLLER'S RADIO SHOW
ATLANTA - In case you missed it, Greater Georgia Chairwoman Kelly Loeffler joined radio show host Martha Zoller on her WDUN morning show today to discuss Greater Georgia's mission to register more voters, engage more communities, and restore election integrity. Kelly also talked about the organization's recent [push](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001sv24_gwDwChLu6pULSL0gWIH4nNBlX5DttwXFj-jNbi3LELtvQvWTFWabyXgL02UKdbdYQTpIl_T14NNnBVQ7NvRYGY-ALelpw6VzTrkZuwp9drEBO_QQ1-So1I4lyg0igjtNlvCIJuRY2BbppUepq7DkjTkNx8Qgf_XAN8YHL0uMvFl2jmw4r84WYAuLg3FTbOSoQ9RZygCV4qA30hT08QApZMxuOmUgPZ_8phz9ys5AbeYXFmcXb8n0Egn1_CFi_CgVt0KQgTtz-XVLnqAEoukVvj2gKiIv0LVGBazhTw=&c=0g8h3PrxCRWQfBm4y_T80sJa8s6srzT062p13GtiSiCV46-h1drk-w==&ch=J31IJHqSUp5_MOOaUQ5oKynpyw3Qb_7tb-JwyKXcFpz64I0K1aWmmw==&jrc=1) to hold Georgia Secretary of State Brad Raffensperger [accountable](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001sv24_gwDwChLu6pULSL0gWIH4nNBlX5DttwXFj-jNbi3LELtvQvWTFWabyXgL02UB3vgsBuyQu_MFiJdmDprO35TgxwZ_yRx1cbDMWTdbOltc8WXUsTP_1P1mnULgJvREYoDitm1Gc6YN3SXFjFDQxGYEInemEOznPegROxvUhWiJIBXU6kViA1OLJLbKZJW8r9aiaBHSP2jAujD9twxWoF-QUJzfhnhdK_Hn07Soae-Ysgw6CGx5A==&c=0g8h3PrxCRWQfBm4y_T80sJa8s6srzT062p13GtiSiCV46-h1drk-w==&ch=J31IJHqSUp5_MOOaUQ5oKynpyw3Qb_7tb-JwyKXcFpz64I0K1aWmmw==&jrc=1) for the rapid, inconsistent changes he made to potentially benefit his own self-interests leading up to the 2020 elections, which resulted in a loss of confidence in the process.
Click [HERE](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001sv24_gwDwChLu6pULSL0gWIH4nNBlX5DttwXFj-jNbi3LELtvQvWTANrkAa1IutTnWZ-wJfCHqFftoo9kHT8kNecm5SkASEUY8LRh63V6CnEFJkN9o4NR73_hAo6wB2wTxjP3FDht0CQgtL4ghsuww==&c=0g8h3PrxCRWQfBm4y_T80sJa8s6srzT062p13GtiSiCV46-h1drk-w==&ch=J31IJHqSUp5_MOOaUQ5oKynpyw3Qb_7tb-JwyKXcFpz64I0K1aWmmw==&jrc=1) or the photo below to listen to the full interview:
---
| [ ](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001sv24_gwDwChLu6pULSL0gWIH4nNBlX5DttwXFj-jNbi3LELtvQvWTANrkAa1IutTnWZ-wJfCHqFftoo9kHT8kNecm5SkASEUY8LRh63V6CnEFJkN9o4NR73_hAo6wB2wTxjP3FDht0CQgtL4ghsuww==&c=0g8h3PrxCRWQfBm4y_T80sJa8s6srzT062p13GtiSiCV46-h1drk-w==&ch=J31IJHqSUp5_MOOaUQ5oKynpyw3Qb_7tb-JwyKXcFpz64I0K1aWmmw==&jrc=1)
---
| As Kelly said:
"I sent a letter to Attorney General Carr asking him to investigate Secretary Raffensperger for potential conflicts of interest ... This is not about the outcome of our election in 2020 or 2021. It's to restore confidence and hold our top elections official accountable ... We've seen sweeping, unprecedented changes made to our elections in 2020, much of it related to the pandemic, but there was also a consent decree signed unbeknownst to the General Assembly. It came out last month that Secretary Raffensperger took $5.5 million from Big Tech, on top of the money that went to the counties. He conducted a mass-mailing of unsolicited absentee ballot request forms, and the list goes on, culminating in orchestrating the recording and release of a call with President Trump just two days before David Perdue and my Senate runoff, which really demoralized voters and served to suppress voters to the tune of about 339,000 Republicans who voted in November, who did not come back out in January. So, I want to know what happened, and if nothing happened, then we should reassure voters that we've looked at it...
"Georgians just want to know [the process] is fair. They want to know that their vote is going to be treated and scrutinized in the same way as the next person's vote, and that's why I applauded the Election Integrity Act (S.B. 202) that was passed and signed into law by Governor Kemp, and that is a tremendous starting point for us to approach the upcoming elections next year...
"No one's above the law, even our top elections official, and that's really why I started Greater Georgia, it's to make sure we're addressing all of this well in advance of an election, that we're getting our folks registered, that we're keeping them engaged or bringing new folks into the party, and that we have election integrity."
---

clean_body: | | | | | | | FOR IMMEDIATE RELEASE MONDAY, MAY 3, 2021 ICYMI: KELLY LOEFFLER JOINS MARTHA ZOLLER'S RADIO SHOW ATLANTA - In case you missed it, Greater Georgia Chairwoman Kelly Loeffler joined radio show host Martha Zoller on her WDUN morning show today to discuss Greater Georgia's mission to register more voters, engage more communities, and restore election integrity. Kelly also talked about the organization's recent to hold Georgia Secretary of State Brad Raffensperger for the rapid, inconsistent changes he made to potentially benefit his own self-interests leading up to the 2020 elections, which resulted in a loss of confidence in the process. Click or the photo below to listen to the full interview: | | As Kelly said: "I sent a letter to Attorney General Carr asking him to investigate Secretary Raffensperger for potential conflicts of interest ... This is not about the outcome of our election in 2020 or 2021. It's to restore confidence and hold our top elections official accountable ... We've seen sweeping, unprecedented changes made to our elections in 2020, much of it related to the pandemic, but there was also a consent decree signed unbeknownst to the General Assembly. It came out last month that Secretary Raffensperger took $5.5 million from Big Tech, on top of the money that went to the counties. He conducted a mass-mailing of unsolicited absentee ballot request forms, and the list goes on, culminating in orchestrating the recording and release of a call with President Trump just two days before David Perdue and my Senate runoff, which really demoralized voters and served to suppress voters to the tune of about 339,000 Republicans who voted in November, who did not come back out in January. So, I want to know what happened, and if nothing happened, then we should reassure voters that we've looked at it... "Georgians just want to know [the process] is fair. They want to know that their vote is going to be treated and scrutinized in the same way as the next person's vote, and that's why I applauded the Election Integrity Act (S.B. 202) that was passed and signed into law by Governor Kemp, and that is a tremendous starting point for us to approach the upcoming elections next year... "No one's above the law, even our top elections official, and that's really why I started Greater Georgia, it's to make sure we're addressing all of this well in advance of an election, that we're getting our folks registered, that we're keeping them engaged or bringing new folks into the party, and that we have election integrity." | ### Media Contact: mailto:press@greatergeorgia.com | | | | Paid for by Greater Georgia Action, Inc. name: Team AOC
subject: Re: The Census
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez for Congress
body:
We came up just 89 people short, but we are still proud of our work.
# [](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/go/143?refcode=em20210503-2063-header&t=1&akid=2063%2E2526796%2E99x3l6)
**FIRST:** New York was projected to lose _two_ Congressional seats in the U.S. House following the 2020 census.
[](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/aoc-email-20210429-2?refcode=em20210503-2063-P&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=2&refcode2=2063_2526796_99x3l6&akid=2063%2E2526796%2E99x3l6)
**THEN:** AOC redirected _$1 million_ from her campaign operation to spread the word about the census using digital ads, flyers, and phone banks to encourage people in her district, half of whom are immigrants, to participate.
[](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/aoc-email-20210429-2?refcode=em20210503-2063-P&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=3&refcode2=2063_2526796_99x3l6&akid=2063%2E2526796%2E99x3l6)
Because of this work and the tireless efforts of organizers and activists across the state, New York will only lose _one seat_ (not two) which is a big victory.
**Nevertheless, after losing seats in states like California and New York and with redistricting on the horizon, we will need to work harder to defend a Democratic majority in the next election.** We came up just 89 people short of keeping both seats in New York, which proves how high the stakes are.
**NOW:** We’re asking if you can chip in $3 to help our campaign continue to organize communities in our district and support progressive candidates across the country who will fight for working families and defend our Democratic majority in Congress.
**[If you’re able to, please make a $3 donation to Team AOC today and we’ll put it right to work in our efforts to maintain our majority and elect more progressives to join the Squad.](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/aoc-email-20210429-2?refcode=em20210503-2063-P&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=23&refcode2=2063_2526796_99x3l6&akid=2063%2E2526796%2E99x3l6)**
**[Contribute $3](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/aoc-email-20210429-2?refcode=em20210503-2063-P&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=24&refcode2=2063_2526796_99x3l6&akid=2063%2E2526796%2E99x3l6)**
In 2022, we can’t leave anything up to chance. We know that elections can be decided by as few as 89 people, which is why we need to start laying the groundwork and organizing _now_.
It’s through door-to-door canvassing that we were able to get the word out about the census and that same organizing work is what it will take to win in blue, purple, and red districts across the country.
[**In the face of these losses and redistricting, it will take all of us working together to maintain our majority and elect more progressives. Please chip in what you can today.**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/aoc-email-20210429-2?refcode=em20210503-2063-P&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=25&refcode2=2063_2526796_99x3l6&akid=2063%2E2526796%2E99x3l6)
With thanks,
Team AOC

**[Donate](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/aoc-email-20210429-2?refcode=em20210503-2063-P&t=26&refcode2=2063_2526796_99x3l6&akid=2063%2E2526796%2E99x3l6)**
---
[](https://www.facebook.com/OcasioCortez/?t=27&akid=2063%2E2526796%2E99x3l6) | [](https://twitter.com/AOC?t=28&akid=2063%2E2526796%2E99x3l6) | [](https://www.instagram.com/aoc/?t=29&akid=2063%2E2526796%2E99x3l6)
Email us: [us@ocasiocortez.com](mailto: us@ocasiocortez.com)
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way we keep in touch with people like you, so thank you for reading to the end. Small donors like you keep us going. To contribute via check, please address to Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez for Congress, PO Box 680080, Corona, NY 11368.

* [Update My Personal Information](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/signup/did-your-information-change/?t=30&akid=2063%2E2526796%2E99x3l6)
* [Unsubscribe](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=31&akid=2063%2E2526796%2E99x3l6)

subject: Trump on his next rally: “WE’LL DO ONE SOON!”

body:
** "We'll do one soon!" \- President Trump**

Trump's made it official--his next rally is just around the corner--and his timing couldn't be better.

**Democrats are working around the clock to erase Trump 's legacy for good, that's why we need top patriots like you to step up and stand with Trump!**
_****_
**[**STAND WITH TRUMP**](https://secure.winred.com/nrsc/help-take-back-the-senate/?sc=pem51037m13m&utm_campaign=20210503_TY-2.101720_mike_t1061341-575&utm_medium=emailp&utm_source=TY-2.101720&utm_content=20210503_trump-on-his-next-rally-well-do-one-soon)**
---
_****_
Our America First movement is becoming more and more important in ensuring we protect President Trump's accomplishments on immigration, job growth and the nomination of THREE conservative Supreme Court judges.

**That 's why we need to know if you stand with Trump and support him holding a rally.**
_****_
**[**STAND WITH TRUMP**](https://secure.winred.com/nrsc/help-take-back-the-senate/?sc=pem51037m13m&utm_campaign=20210503_TY-2.101720_mike_t1061341-575&utm_medium=emailp&utm_source=TY-2.101720&utm_content=20210503_trump-on-his-next-rally-well-do-one-soon)**
---
_****_
**This is a critical juncture --the time Americans MUST choose whether to stand with democracy and freedom, or sit back and allow socialism to destroy all we hold dear.**

If you don't stand with President Trump, four years of America First will have all been for nothing. [**Stand with President Trump!**](https://secure.winred.com/nrsc/help-take-back-the-senate/?sc=pem51037m13m&utm_campaign=20210503_TY-2.101720_mike_t1061341-575&utm_medium=emailp&utm_source=TY-2.101720&utm_content=20210503_trump-on-his-next-rally-well-do-one-soon)

name: Ron DeSantis
subject: This is criminal
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the Republican Governors Association
body:
Biden is risking our nation's security

| | |
---

Friend,

Prior to Joe Biden's administration, when a convicted criminal alien was released from prison, ICE would send them back to their home country. Now, _convicted criminal aliens are no longer being deported, they 're being released back into our communities!_

As Biden dismantles the Trump border policies that worked, the situation at our southern border has devolved into a huge catastrophe with national consequences. [**GOP leaders like me are filing suit against Biden 's administration to protect our communities from their reckless policy, but we can't do it alone.**](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001pbtu5rHnG03bSAVDJlnAH3VckIJNHYE6I11Q2N10JTSx0Vq4Pp6sMW7b6zAiK5yvix_VGjonQETStcLj9wPKo8-0AfAsONcOsCj1yOTegKOh5UDM78Ix_GSkX5pi1Wd2wD6PlQ_Tdvz4bGLSndRTggFyw_eG0ySZUJzSnJexqWtJhWwBmOMAvGlYe1IdNOSZ03e-56xBisTD7uhKMxKW3fJPpJAmq97TKRK53UHm19BpyJkIy06OafXTM6YLxcfOJa8eHN6908TCAb-eeXMYExKxG6JL9cjWGcbmvh6X20q1_xEz7uxKZ0VOv-vLdoj2cTu18al4gXlGwSmWqzTUpw6nEfbcOjbsoSkgw4re6GI0QaBRC3JdacSOm3LnFAFz_VE6UWpmzBD7qB2NuZKelkvdoAg8Djx-nR56WjQ7jucHfi4nr2Hdqw==&c=9V63JMsI3L8VSMccWREZAqZvmhz3QlhWbKVL3HwSh8BRg1tZSBzkCA==&ch=ht0jAyDnKJuu5szVFSoDAZbF-wywCXDQiQ7veCR10URk1uWokJu6BA==)
[STAND WITH GOP GOVERNORS ](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001pbtu5rHnG03bSAVDJlnAH3VckIJNHYE6I11Q2N10JTSx0Vq4Pp6sMW7b6zAiK5yvix_VGjonQETStcLj9wPKo8-0AfAsONcOsCj1yOTegKOh5UDM78Ix_GSkX5pi1Wd2wD6PlQ_Tdvz4bGLSndRTggFyw_eG0ySZUJzSnJexqWtJhWwBmOMAvGlYe1IdNOSZ03e-56xBisTD7uhKMxKW3fJPpJAmq97TKRK53UHm19BpyJkIy06OafXTM6YLxcfOJa8eHN6908TCAb-eeXMYExKxG6JL9cjWGcbmvh6X20q1_xEz7uxKZ0VOv-vLdoj2cTu18al4gXlGwSmWqzTUpw6nEfbcOjbsoSkgw4re6GI0QaBRC3JdacSOm3LnFAFz_VE6UWpmzBD7qB2NuZKelkvdoAg8Djx-nR56WjQ7jucHfi4nr2Hdqw==&c=9V63JMsI3L8VSMccWREZAqZvmhz3QlhWbKVL3HwSh8BRg1tZSBzkCA==&ch=ht0jAyDnKJuu5szVFSoDAZbF-wywCXDQiQ7veCR10URk1uWokJu6BA==) Friend, this issue is a no brainer. Biden cannot simply default on his responsibility to enforce the law under the Constitution. It's not only a dereliction of duty, it's a direct threat to the safety and security of our communities.

[**Biden has failed on illegal immigration and rule of law, and GOP governors are the last line of defense against Biden 's most dangerous policies. Please stand with us today. **](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001pbtu5rHnG03bSAVDJlnAH3VckIJNHYE6I11Q2N10JTSx0Vq4Pp6sMW7b6zAiK5yvix_VGjonQETStcLj9wPKo8-0AfAsONcOsCj1yOTegKOh5UDM78Ix_GSkX5pi1Wd2wD6PlQ_Tdvz4bGLSndRTggFyw_eG0ySZUJzSnJexqWtJhWwBmOMAvGlYe1IdNOSZ03e-56xBisTD7uhKMxKW3fJPpJAmq97TKRK53UHm19BpyJkIy06OafXTM6YLxcfOJa8eHN6908TCAb-eeXMYExKxG6JL9cjWGcbmvh6X20q1_xEz7uxKZ0VOv-vLdoj2cTu18al4gXlGwSmWqzTUpw6nEfbcOjbsoSkgw4re6GI0QaBRC3JdacSOm3LnFAFz_VE6UWpmzBD7qB2NuZKelkvdoAg8Djx-nR56WjQ7jucHfi4nr2Hdqw==&c=9V63JMsI3L8VSMccWREZAqZvmhz3QlhWbKVL3HwSh8BRg1tZSBzkCA==&ch=ht0jAyDnKJuu5szVFSoDAZbF-wywCXDQiQ7veCR10URk1uWokJu6BA==) Thank you,

Ron DeSantis

body:
14 Democrats are up for re-election in the Senate. We only need ONE SEAT.

14 Democrats are up for re-election in the Senate.

subject: Tell Republicans: “Trump lost! Stop lying!”
body:

| | | | | _Having trouble viewing this email? [View it in your web browser](https://leftaction.salsalabs.org/tellrepublicanstrumplostenoughalreadywiththebiglie1?wvpId=368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)_

And it’s no wonder, given the vast majority of Republicans in Congress don’t have the guts to admit out loud that Trump lost. **So it’s up to us. [Add your name, and tell Republicans: “Trump lost. name: Mark Kelly
subject: Thank You
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Mark Kelly for Senate
body:
#

Friends —
I wanted to pause for a moment and thank you for your support this past month and for being a part of this team.
We just wrapped up our April fundraising deadline — and my team is still combing over the results — but from what we can tell so far, I think our results are going to be great.
And that’s important for two reasons: one, because we aren’t taking a dime of corporate PAC money. And two, because a Super PAC has already pledged to spend $10 million to defeat us in next year’s Arizona Senate race.
It’s your support that will give us the ability to go up against the special interests who want to defeat us — so thank you, I can’t imagine doing this without you.
The months ahead are going to be critical for building up this team so we can prepare for the tough fights ahead. National Republicans think they can flip this seat in 2022, so it’s going to take an even bigger and more energetic team this time around to hold this seat.
And the good news is, there’s still a lot of ways you can be involved. Whether you are donating or sharing our social media posts — every action you take supports this ongoing mission for our shared values. And I want you to know that I’m extremely grateful for everything you do.
I look forward to what’s next knowing that I have you all by my side, it really makes all of the difference.
Full speed ahead,
— Mark
If you are able, please consider making a donation to help fuel our people-powered campaign.
We need to get off to a strong start in 2021, and anything you can give will go a long way since we don’t take a dime of corporate PAC money.
We appreciate your support!
**[DONATE NOW](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mek-em-may21?refcode=em210503-1-15&t=1&refcode2=551_6688874_sF_BJ0&akid=551%2E6688874%2EsF_BJ0)**

Paid For By Mark Kelly for Senate
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is a very important way we communicate with supporters like you, but if you want to, you can [ unsubscribe here](https://act.markkelly.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe?t=2&akid=551%2E6688874%2EsF_BJ0).
Mark Kelly was a Captain in the U.S. Navy and astronaut. Use of his military rank, job titles and photographs in uniform does not imply endorsement by the Department of the Navy or Department of Defense and reference to NASA does not imply endorsement by the National Aeronautics and Space Administration.

National Republicans think they can flip this seat in 2022, so it’s going to take an even bigger and more energetic team this time around to hold this seat. And the good news is, there’s still a lot of ways you can be involved. Whether you are donating or sharing our social media posts — every action you take supports this ongoing mission for our shared values. And I want you to know that I’m extremely grateful for everything you do. I look forward to what’s next knowing that I have you all by my side, it really makes all of the difference. Full speed ahead, — Mark If you are able, please consider making a donation to help fuel our people-powered campaign. We need to get off to a strong start in 2021, and anything you can give will go a long way since we don’t take a dime of corporate PAC money. We appreciate your support! Paid For By Mark Kelly for Senate

body:

We're reaching out one last time.

name: Sen. Street
subject: I so appreciate it
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY SHARIF STREET FOR PA
body:
The amount of support and excitement that’s grown around my exploration into running for Senate in just the past week is humbling and proves to me that the people of Pennsylvania are yearning for a new kind of leader. | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/28611972/283781571/902632477?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDYvMS84MzEwOCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0ZDlhZDBlNS01MWFjLWViMTEtODVhYS0wMDUwZjIzN2FiZWYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=iI-h6bpF-EmlnaNOrEaavklREQrFXtajRMDPhV7sAY4=&emci=469ad0e5-51ac-eb11-85aa-0050f237abef&emdi=4d9ad0e5-51ac-eb11-85aa-0050f237abef&ceid=15053672) | The amount of support and excitement that’s grown around my exploration into running for Senate in just the past week is humbling and proves to me that the people of Pennsylvania are yearning for a new kind of leader. Since we announced our exploratory committee, we reached our goal for founding donations and we’re ready to kick off our listening tour across our Commonwealth. I can’t wait to share what we hear in these intimate conversations with all of you. But above all else, I want to thank you for believing in me and believing in our fight for justice. My father was a hotdog vendor who became the mayor of Philadelphia, and he instilled in me a deep appreciation for not only where I came from -- a poor neighborhood in North Philly -- but what I could accomplish by following my morals and never wavering from what’s right. But I’m also the grandson of a dairy farmer. That experience has helped me understand the similar struggles all Pennsylvania families face, be they from urban or rural communities. I’ve been fighting for Pennsylvanians trapped in our broken criminal justice system, workers struggling to make ends meet, and families stuck in cycles of poverty as a state senator. Now, I’m looking to the horizon to see how I can serve the people of Pennsylvania more holistically. I’m so happy to have you with me on this journey. clean_body: The amount of support and excitement that’s grown around my exploration into running for Senate in just the past week is humbling and proves to me that the people of Pennsylvania are yearning for a new kind of leader. | | The amount of support and excitement that’s grown around my exploration into running for Senate in just the past week is humbling and proves to me that the people of Pennsylvania are yearning for a new kind of leader. Since we announced our exploratory committee, we reached our goal for founding donations and we’re ready to kick off our listening tour across our Commonwealth. I can’t wait to share what we hear in these intimate conversations with all of you. But above all else, I want to thank you for believing in me and believing in our fight for justice. My father was a hotdog vendor who became the mayor of Philadelphia, and he instilled in me a deep appreciation for not only where I came from -- a poor neighborhood in North Philly -- but what I could accomplish by following my morals and never wavering from what’s right. But I’m also the grandson of a dairy farmer. That experience has helped me understand the similar struggles all Pennsylvania families face, be they from urban or rural communities. I’ve been fighting for Pennsylvanians trapped in our broken criminal justice system, workers struggling to make ends meet, and families stuck in cycles of poverty as a state senator. Now, I’m looking to the horizon to see how I can serve the people of Pennsylvania more holistically. I’m so happy to have you with me on this journey. subject: Ted Cruz just got into the Virginia Governor’s race
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Terry for Virginia
body:
Amanda Chase isn’t the only extremist running in Virginia.
| | |
---
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/28612712/283783879/-2023814932?refcode=20210503_VA_5TC&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTMvMS84NzU5MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiNjA1NjRjMi01M2FjLWViMTEtODVhYS0wMDUwZjIzN2FiZWYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=umkLZUrzVMwm2NZWvC29oonc3B300CCnsNMcLChsgX4=)

| | Derek,

Amanda Chase isn’t the only extreme right-winger running for the Republican Virginia Governor’s nomination.

Since joining the race, Glenn Youngkin has followed Donald Trump’s divisive playbook to a “T.” One of Glenn’s first ads was even a love letter comparing himself to Trump. Then he doubled down on Trump’s big lie that the election was stolen by starting a Georgia-style voter suppression operation.

Now Youngkin is getting another big endorsement from the extreme-right: Texas Senator Ted Cruz.

[**Will you donate and help Terry send the message that we don’t need Ted Cruz in Virginia?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/28612713/283783880/-2023814932?refcode=20210503_VA_5TC&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTMvMS84NzU5MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiNjA1NjRjMi01M2FjLWViMTEtODVhYS0wMDUwZjIzN2FiZWYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=umkLZUrzVMwm2NZWvC29oonc3B300CCnsNMcLChsgX4=)

We know Cruz is a clown. He’s the guy who decided to fly to Cancun while Texans had no access to heat, water, and food. He was Donald Trump’s gleeful lap dog, even after Trump accused his dad of assassinating JFK during the Presidential campaign.

Derek, Cruz is a national joke, but here’s why his endorsement isn’t.

Right now Glenn Youngkin is trying to use his deep pockets and his rolodex of establishment Republicans to try and buy the Republican Virginia Governor’s nomination.

**Youngkin raised more money than ANYONE running for Governor last quarter (including Terry) and if national Republicans like Cruz line up behind him, he’s going to have endless resources to run a Trump-style, scorched-earth campaign smearing Terry.**

The best way for us to fight back is to support Terry -- pitch in right now so we can fight back.

subject: ALERT: Biden and Schumer reaffirm plans to pass RADICAL election reform
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the National Victory Action Fund
body:
Chuck Schumer and the Democrats are moving full steam ahead with their promise to rewrite the rules of our elections. President Biden reaffirmed this priority in his Address to Congress this week.

_**
ALERT: Schumer sets deadline to pass H.R. 1 **_ _****_

Dan Crenshaw here.

Republicans failed to meet their end-of-month goal. We **lost** a crucial opportunity to take down Pelosi and the Squad -- now the country is in danger of being taken over by Radical Socialists.

You heard Biden's speech last week... the Left wants to raise taxes astronomically, throw away thousands of American jobs, and open our borders. And when Republicans are dangerously underfunded like we are right now, we are in _no_ position to fight back against them.

clean_body: Republicans failed to meet their end of month goal. Dan Crenshaw here. As a member of the House of Representatives, I wanted to reach out to you personally because what I'm about to tell you is extremely important. Republicans failed to meet their end-of-month goal. We lost a crucial opportunity to take down Pelosi and the Squad -- now the country is in danger of being taken over by Radical Socialists. You heard Biden's speech last week... the Left wants to raise taxes astronomically, throw away thousands of American jobs, and open our borders. And when Republicans are dangerously underfunded like we are right now, we are in no position to fight back against them. == == 600% MATCHING ACTIVATED For Conservatives like myself, nothing is more important than fighting day in and day out in Congress to stop the Radical Left and their crooked fantasies for America. While my colleagues and I have been busy saving President Trump's legacy and putting America first, the Left continues with their ridiculous political charades. The Democrats rely on their dark money rolodex for support -- but we're proud to say we rely on support from tried and true, grassroots patriots like yourself who make the America First agenda possible. That's why we were disappointed to see we were way off the mark last month. We've known all along that national Democrats would come into Indiana to try and turn our state blue by pouring out millions of dollars against Todd.
We've known all along that national Democrats would come into Indiana to try and turn our state blue by pouring out millions of dollars against Todd. Now, we're seeing their plans unfold as DNC Chairman Jaime Harrison comes to raise money right here in Indiana.

**That 's the same Jaime Harrison that spent over $100 MILLION against Senator Lindsey Graham last year.** Harrison and the radical Democrats will have no problem raising unimaginable amounts from their liberal billionaire donors in California and New York.

**If we have any chance of taking back the Senate Majority from Democrats, we must Keep Indiana RED! Will you step up today to support Todd and help win back the Senate Majority?** ****

clean_body: | | | | , | We need to remind Nancy Pelosi and her allies that their big-government agenda is not welcome in Iowa. I’m building a force of grassroots donors to send them a message. I hope I will see your name on our grassroots donor list by the end of the week. | | | Your support will make a difference! Randy | \--------- Forwarded message --------- From: Randy Feenstra Subject: Pelosi’s allies are back... To: dpwillis67@gmail.com | | , | Last November, Northwest Iowa sent a clear message to Nancy Pelosi and her allies. Every day since then I’ve been working to deliver on my promise to bring conservative results for Iowa families. But Nancy Pelosi’s hand-picked candidate, J.D. Scholten, is already talking about running again... If the map gets drawn in his favor. | | | I’m proud to represent an area I’ve called home my whole life, and no matter what, I’ll continue to work hard every day to deliver for our district and our state. We need to send a clear message to Pelosi and her allies that we don’t want their liberal policies in Iowa. Help me show them just how many Iowans are willing to stand up to their big-government agenda. | | | | | | | | | Thank you for your continued support. Randy | | Paid for by Feenstra for Congress Not interested in email updates from Feenstra For Congress? **I'm running for governor to restore the promise of Arizona and build a state that works for everyone, but I'm going to need big thinkers with me to get it done. body:
Did you hear the news, Peter?
| [**BREAKING NEWS:

name: Steve Schale
subject: This isn't just our recognition, it’s yours as well
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Unite the Country, [unitethecountry
body:
We had one of the top ads of 2020 — all thanks to you. | Dear Peter: As a supporter of ours in 2020, you know that we took great pride in making television and digital content that was driven by research. Among all the outside groups, month after month, our ads tested among the very best ads in testing scenarios. And that hard work was just recognized by our fellow political operative peers. **One of our ads, "Deserve,” was named the top ad made by an independent group during the 2020 Presidential cycle by the American Association of Political Consultants.** [](https://click.everyaction.com/k/28617781/283799418/-994486177?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNS8xLzc4OTg3IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjFkNjNjMDk3LTY5YWMtZWIxMS04NWFhLTAwNTBmMjM3YWJlZiIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=VNWzKYjkGKoDYxyiHA7lHeuoHFP4Eyrf-QXaeyFsBDA=&emci=1c63c097-69ac-eb11-85aa-0050f237abef&emdi=1d63c097-69ac-eb11-85aa-0050f237abef&ceid=16951753) “Deserve” was one of the first ads we ran in Michigan, Pennsylvania, and Wisconsin, and was based on our research showing voters had a limited understanding of Joe Biden's middle class background, and how his personal story impacted his work as Vice President. We ran the ad at a time when Trump was beginning to attack Biden, and in testing, we saw it had a four point positive impact on Biden's favorables. The ad did so well, we finished the race with a shorter version of it in the same markets where it ran over the summer. Moreover, we just learned that the ad we are running on television in Pennsylvania, and through digital platforms in Wisconsin and Pennsylvania, is the top ad of the post-presidential period when it comes to impacting how voters view Joe Biden's work on the economy. The ad, “Bold,” leans into the work of the American Rescue Plan, and how the plan helps everyday families. [](https://click.everyaction.com/k/28617782/283799419/-803653937?v=QA27BLl9SRM&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNS8xLzc4OTg3IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjFkNjNjMDk3LTY5YWMtZWIxMS04NWFhLTAwNTBmMjM3YWJlZiIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=VNWzKYjkGKoDYxyiHA7lHeuoHFP4Eyrf-QXaeyFsBDA=&emci=1c63c097-69ac-eb11-85aa-0050f237abef&emdi=1d63c097-69ac-eb11-85aa-0050f237abef&ceid=16951753) **We are immensely proud of our work, and we know that we couldn't do any of it without your support — so this isn't just our recognition, it is yours as well.** Thanks again, Steve Schale
---
* * *
Unite the Country was formed in 2019 to support Joe Biden’s candidacy for President. After a resounding victory in 2020, our goal now is to communicate to the American electorate how President Biden’s agenda will both advance broad and desperately needed policy changes and help to heal our fractured political environment.

Unite the Country is proud to continue to support President Biden’s bold agenda and vision for America, and we will support candidates for public office who have similar foresight and courage. [Donate now to support President Joe Biden in the political and legislative fights ahead!](https://click.everyaction.com/k/28617783/283799420/-1089539254?amount=other&refcode=em_utc_fr_email-footer-1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNS8xLzc4OTg3IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjFkNjNjMDk3LTY5YWMtZWIxMS04NWFhLTAwNTBmMjM3YWJlZiIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=VNWzKYjkGKoDYxyiHA7lHeuoHFP4Eyrf-QXaeyFsBDA=)

**[Donate Monthly](https://click.everyaction.com/k/28617785/283799422/-1089539254?recurring=true&amount=other&refcode=em_utc_fr_email-footer-1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNS8xLzc4OTg3IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjFkNjNjMDk3LTY5YWMtZWIxMS04NWFhLTAwNTBmMjM3YWJlZiIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=VNWzKYjkGKoDYxyiHA7lHeuoHFP4Eyrf-QXaeyFsBDA=)**

subject: Pending: Peter's submission

clean_body: I’d love to get your input. | Peter, I became the National Chair of Governor Greitens’ Senate campaign because I believe we need to elect Republicans who actually listen to you and fight for you. As a pro-Trump Navy Seal, Eric Greitens is the man for the job. That’s why I want to begin the new month by asking voters like you to take our survey and let us know your top priorities. President Trump was such a strong leader because he shunned the consultants in the swamp and instead listened directly to the American people. Erics Greitens is taking a page straight out of President Trump’s playbook by commissioning this survey for you. I hope you’ll tell us which issues are most important to you as we fight to win this Senate seat and build a new majority that puts the American people first. Thank you, Kimberly Guilfoyle National Chair Greitens for U.S. Senate Paid for by Greitens for U.S. Senate PO Box 989, Chesterfield, MO 63006 Military images and information do not imply endorsement by DOD [Department of Defense] or any service branch.

subject: True the Vote Weekly Update | 5.3.21
body:
| | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/ba5f9137d0a2/tbn56m1exr-7232893?e=ad8cba7e98)
---
| |
---
| |
* * *
May 3, 2021 Last week we spoke at great length with a reporter from CNN. She was writing a piece about Stacey Abrams, Marc Elias, and their campaign to convince America that Georgia's newly-passed Election Integrity Act, SB-202, will lead to electoral apocalypse. The reporter wanted to know what we thought about a video in which Abrams took aim at [elector challenges](https://truethevote.us8.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d9ab56570d4ecf7b7df9d4c25&id=7f2a16e9ae&e=ad8cba7e98) _(quick sidebar: we helped Georgia citizens file over 364,000 elector challenges in Dec. 2020; Abrams' group Fair Fight' attorney Marc Elias sued us and threatened to sue any county in Georgia that reviewed the challenges; we countersued Fair Fight and offered to defend any county in Georgia that was sued over the challenges...I tell ya' there's never a dull moment around here...but, back to the story)_ Abrams' comments made great clickbait, but she isn't telling the truth. All the histrionics over SB-202, the claims of suppression, the corporate boycotts, the bazillion lawsuits ([cha-ching! $150m and counting, right Marc?](https://truethevote.us8.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d9ab56570d4ecf7b7df9d4c25&id=0fc6b2592a&e=ad8cba7e98)) ... it's all strategically conjured for political and mega financial gain. So, what's really in SB-202?
---
|
---
| **THE VIDEO** [](https://truethevote.us8.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d9ab56570d4ecf7b7df9d4c25&id=b723ead2c1&e=ad8cba7e98) Let's break down the Abrams video.... and set the record straight.
* * *
**THE TRUTH ABOUT ELECTOR CHALLENGES** **What's this really about?** Abrams doesn't want ineligible voter records to be removed from voter rolls. So, to raise a woke ruckus she equates challenges to caging. A challenge is when a voter in a county submits a letter to the county election board providing probable cause to question the accuracy of a voter record, specifically if the voter is known to have moved. According to Ballotpedia, [caging](https://truethevote.us8.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d9ab56570d4ecf7b7df9d4c25&id=0f3e749a1b&e=ad8cba7e98) refers to a practice in which a political party or another partisan organization sends registered mail to addresses of registered voters whom they have identified as likely to be unfriendly to their candidate. All mail that is returned as undeliverable is placed on what is called a caging list. They are not the same thing. Geesh. The fact is that the state of Georgia hasn't cleaned its rolls in years. Why? Well, one reason is that Abrams keeps [suing the state to prevent it](https://truethevote.us8.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d9ab56570d4ecf7b7df9d4c25&id=ebf0a44c05&e=ad8cba7e98). Why would a politico want errant records, knowing that every time an ineligible vote is cast it dilutes accuracy? Hmmm... BUT, when voters file their own challenges that's something more difficult to stop. That's 'we the people' taking action to support election integrity. And that's not the way Abrams wants it to work. In her video, Abrams gives the example of a “conspiracy theory guy who doesn’t think his neighbors should be eligible to vote and now this means he can file a complaint on as many people as he likes, and that voter is then forced to defend his/herself. Regardless of how frivolous the complaint is, county boards are now forced to sit and listen to every challenge.” If voter rolls are maintained [as required by the National Voter Registration Act,](https://truethevote.us8.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d9ab56570d4ecf7b7df9d4c25&id=d3f69b9082&e=ad8cba7e98) then Georgia voters won’t have to be concerned that their legal vote is going to be diluted by an illegal vote — and fewer elector challenges will be necessary. So, let's get those rolls cleaned, Georgia! Please refer to [OCGA §210 2-230(g)](https://truethevote.us8.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d9ab56570d4ecf7b7df9d4c25&id=3b80094619&e=ad8cba7e98) for a detailed description of elector challenges. For what SB-202 says about, [**take a look at section 14**](https://truethevote.us8.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d9ab56570d4ecf7b7df9d4c25&id=df72dae6d7&e=ad8cba7e98).
* * *
**THE TRUTH ABOUT ... WATER (?)
** **What's this really about?** Political activists were handing out food and water less than 150 feet from polling places. That's electioneering. It's well established that candidates can't campaign within 150 feet. Activists plying voters with food and water outside the doors of polling places is electioneering and it's intimidating, but it wasn't specifically recognized as illegal so SB-202 clarified it. This has nothing to do with voter discrimination, nor does it prevent anyone from bringing their own water and food, nor does it prevent a food truck or water station, if they're further than 150 feet away. Additionally, water stations can be set up by election offices to provide water within 150 feet of a polling place. Geesh. [**Here's the wording in SB-202**](https://truethevote.us8.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d9ab56570d4ecf7b7df9d4c25&id=24139a27e2&e=ad8cba7e98):
"No person shall solicit votes in any manner or by any means or method, nor shall any person distribute or display any campaign material, nor shall any person give, offer to give, or participate in the giving of any money or gifts, including, but not limited to, food and drink, to an elector, nor shall any person solicit signatures for any petition, nor shall any person, other than election officials discharging their duties, establish or set up any tables or booths on any day in which ballots are being cast (1) Within 150 feet of the outer edge of any building within which a polling place is established; (2) Within any polling place; or (3) Within 25 feet of any voter standing in line to vote at any polling place.”
* * *
**THE TRUTH ABOUT EARLY VOTING _EXPANSION_** **What's this really all about?** Scaring voters, riling up activists, and building power through intimidation. The truth is that voting is not limited to just 8 hours on a single day. It’s 8 hours every single day for at least 17 straight days, including weekends. Counties can also choose to offer expanded hours from 7am to 7pm, so that would be 12 hours, every day, for at least 17 days. [**SB-202**](https://truethevote.us8.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d9ab56570d4ecf7b7df9d4c25&id=e868c5d3b6&e=ad8cba7e98) actually **expands** early voting. Geesh.
* * *
**THE TRUTH ABOUT MOBILE VOTING** **What's this really all about?** Mobile voting is voting inside buses and RVs. It was banned because it is expensive and unregulable. The elderly and infirm are the _least_ likely voting groups to seek out polling locations that require traversing stairs and voting in a confined area. Geesh. See the actual wording in [SB-202, section 20](https://truethevote.us8.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d9ab56570d4ecf7b7df9d4c25&id=d9254de2af&e=ad8cba7e98).
* * *
**THE TRUTH ABOUT CONTINUED USE OF DROP BOXES** **What's this really all about?** Per Abrams video "...limits use of drop boxes, now have 300 fewer hours to use a drop box and in Fulton county, reduced from 38 to 8 drop boxes only because Republicans want to make it harder for people of color to vote." Here's the thing...she's referring to the 'Zuckerberg drop boxes', paid for with millions of Facebook dollars in the run-up to the 2020 General Election, ostensibly because post office regulated mailboxes weren't good enough. (_No, it was clearly a much better idea to put in privately funded[and largely unregulated ](https://truethevote.us8.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d9ab56570d4ecf7b7df9d4c25&id=6413cec64d&e=ad8cba7e98)drop boxes .... geesh)_. In our opinion, they were a disaster and should be eliminated altogether. SB-202 reduces the number of drop boxes and better details security standards, making votes more secure and thereby bolstering election integrity. See the actual wording in [SB-202, section 26](https://truethevote.us8.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d9ab56570d4ecf7b7df9d4c25&id=14fac67345&e=ad8cba7e98).
* * *
**THE TRUTH ABOUT ACCOUNTABILITY** **What's this really all about?** Look, this is your basic no-brainer. Accountability is a feature, not a bug. Simple. See the actual wording in [SB-202, section 6](https://truethevote.us8.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d9ab56570d4ecf7b7df9d4c25&id=ee0443d7e1&e=ad8cba7e98).
* * *
**THE TRUTH ABOUT IDENTIFICATION** **What's this really all about?** Abrams says that SB-202 puts people at risk of identity theft by requesting information to verify their identity. But the truth is, if a voter doesn’t have a driver's license or other government ID, instead they can simply provide the last four digits of their SSN. **That’s it.** See the actual wording in [SB-202, section 25](https://truethevote.us8.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d9ab56570d4ecf7b7df9d4c25&id=fbc02fb2b7&e=ad8cba7e98).
* * *
**THE TRUTH ABOUT WHO STOPPED WHAT** **What's this really about?** Ummm... we guess she's referring to the fact that her organization and many others set up shop outside of the Georgia State Capitol during the entire legislative session, denouncing the bill day after day, screaming obscenities, **[firearms in hand](https://truethevote.us8.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d9ab56570d4ecf7b7df9d4c25&id=4296a7283d&e=ad8cba7e98),** [**name-checking Jim Crow**](https://truethevote.us8.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d9ab56570d4ecf7b7df9d4c25&id=ce3e295e72&e=ad8cba7e98), and threatening elected officials. So, according to Abrams their presence made a difference **([gotta keep up the funding...](https://truethevote.us8.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d9ab56570d4ecf7b7df9d4c25&id=2c68c67d53&e=ad8cba7e98)) **and 'stopped' things from occurring or not occurring, but ... they were just playing for the cameras. We could go on and on....point for point....replacing fiction with fact. Ms. Abrams has been saying a whole lot that needs correcting. And she's not the only one. [Check out what's being said about Texas' election bills](https://truethevote.us8.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d9ab56570d4ecf7b7df9d4c25&id=a395d59c5c&e=ad8cba7e98). Geesh. True the Vote's mission is to empower voters with information. We hope this helps.
* * *
* * *
_P.S. Abrams' group Fair Fight uses [StopJimCrow2.com](https://truethevote.us8.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d9ab56570d4ecf7b7df9d4c25&id=0a94d54564&e=ad8cba7e98) as their web address. The home page quotes Abrams as saying "Georgia Republicans’ shameful efforts ... are nothing less than Jim Crow 2.0". Maybe someone should tell her who originally enacted and enforced Jim Crow laws? [**Hint: It’s not Republicans.**](https://truethevote.us8.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d9ab56570d4ecf7b7df9d4c25&id=4057b14d5d&e=ad8cba7e98)_
---
|
---
| [**SUPPORT ELECTION INTEGRITY WITH TRUE THE VOTE**](https://truethevote.us8.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d9ab56570d4ecf7b7df9d4c25&id=93dd2ce91c&e=ad8cba7e98)
---
|
---
|
# Legislative Updates
We're excited to be working with so many groups who are ready and willing to help support Election Integrity efforts, specifically those that are playing out right now in states across the country. Case in point - [**AMAC Action**](https://truethevote.us8.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d9ab56570d4ecf7b7df9d4c25&id=77cf6280a8&e=ad8cba7e98)!

Since Monday, AMAC Action has been engaging their advocates in Texas in support of House Bill 6, the Election Integrity Protection Act of 2021. So far, _**over 500 emails**_ have been sent to members of the Texas House by AMAC members to encourage support for the bill. These efforts have now gained three new co-sponsors for H.B. 6! AMAC Action continues to push this great initiative. _**If you're a Texas resident, check out AMAC Action and join with hundreds of thousands of Texans who are speaking out in defense of fair and accurate elections in Texas! Do it today! Time is of the essence!**_ [****](https://truethevote.us8.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d9ab56570d4ecf7b7df9d4c25&id=d5b09496a3&e=ad8cba7e98)
---
|
---
|
# MUST READS

**Coca-Cola’s new general counsel is already out, at tumultuous time**
_Atlanta Journal-__Constitution_ \- Coca-Cola’s top lawyer, who had made a public push to diversify the ranks of outside attorneys serving the beverage giant, is vacating the post after less than eight months amid company challenges tied to taxes and social issues.
[Read the rest](https://truethevote.us8.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d9ab56570d4ecf7b7df9d4c25&id=bf921a8106&e=ad8cba7e98)

**Which states gain House seats in 2022 - and which are losing out**
_Politico_ \- Texas netted two new seats thanks to big population growth, while California and New York were among the seven states losing one seat apiece.
[Read the rest](https://truethevote.us8.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d9ab56570d4ecf7b7df9d4c25&id=c2188d9988&e=ad8cba7e98)

**Alabama Senate Delays Vote on Curbside Voting Ban**
_Philadelphia Capital-Star_ \- A Democratic activist group helmed by former U.S. Attorney General Eric Holder has struck an early blow in what’s expected to be a brutal, nationwide legal battle over congressional redistricting, filing lawsuits in Pennsylvania and two other states asking the judiciary to be ready to step in if mapmakers deadlock.
[Read the rest](https://truethevote.us8.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d9ab56570d4ecf7b7df9d4c25&id=c4b1f82693&e=ad8cba7e98)

So, what's really in SB-202? | | THE VIDEO Let's break down the Abrams video.... and set the record straight. THE TRUTH ABOUT ELECTOR CHALLENGES What's this really about? Abrams doesn't want ineligible voter records to be removed from voter rolls. So, to raise a woke ruckus she equates challenges to caging. A challenge is when a voter in a county submits a letter to the county election board providing probable cause to question the accuracy of a voter record, specifically if the voter is known to have moved. According to Ballotpedia, refers to a practice in which a political party or another partisan organization sends registered mail to addresses of registered voters whom they have identified as likely to be unfriendly to their candidate. All mail that is returned as undeliverable is placed on what is called a caging list. They are not the same thing. Geesh. The fact is that the state of Georgia hasn't cleaned its rolls in years. Why? Well, one reason is that Abrams keeps . Why would a politico want errant records, knowing that every time an ineligible vote is cast it dilutes accuracy? Hmmm... BUT, when voters file their own challenges that's something more difficult to stop. That's 'we the people' taking action to support election integrity. And that's not the way Abrams wants it to work. In her video, Abrams gives the example of a “conspiracy theory guy who doesn’t think his neighbors should be eligible to vote and now this means he can file a complaint on as many people as he likes, and that voter is then forced to defend his/herself. Regardless of how frivolous the complaint is, county boards are now forced to sit and listen to every challenge.” If voter rolls are maintained then Georgia voters won’t have to be concerned that their legal vote is going to be diluted by an illegal vote — and fewer elector challenges will be necessary. So, let's get those rolls cleaned, Georgia! Please refer to for a detailed description of elector challenges. For what SB-202 says about, . THE TRUTH ABOUT ... WATER (?) What's this really about? Political activists were handing out food and water less than 150 feet from polling places. That's electioneering. It's well established that candidates can't campaign within 150 feet. Activists plying voters with food and water outside the doors of polling places is electioneering and it's intimidating, but it wasn't specifically recognized as illegal so SB-202 clarified it. This has nothing to do with voter discrimination, nor does it prevent anyone from bringing their own water and food, nor does it prevent a food truck or water station, if they're further than 150 feet away. Additionally, water stations can be set up by election offices to provide water within 150 feet of a polling place. Geesh. : "No person shall solicit votes in any manner or by any means or method, nor shall any person distribute or display any campaign material, nor shall any person give, offer to give, or participate in the giving of any money or gifts, including, but not limited to, food and drink, to an elector, nor shall any person solicit signatures for any petition, nor shall any person, other than election officials discharging their duties, establish or set up any tables or booths on any day in which ballots are being cast (1) Within 150 feet of the outer edge of any building within which a polling place is established; (2) Within any polling place; or (3) Within 25 feet of any voter standing in line to vote at any polling place.” THE TRUTH ABOUT EARLY VOTING EXPANSION What's this really all about? Scaring voters, riling up activists, and building power through intimidation. The truth is that voting is not limited to just 8 hours on a single day. It’s 8 hours every single day for at least 17 straight days, including weekends. Counties can also choose to offer expanded hours from 7am to 7pm, so that would be 12 hours, every day, for at least 17 days. actually expands early voting. Geesh. THE TRUTH ABOUT MOBILE VOTING What's this really all about? Mobile voting is voting inside buses and RVs. It was banned because it is expensive and unregulable. The elderly and infirm are the least likely voting groups to seek out polling locations that require traversing stairs and voting in a confined area. Geesh. See the actual wording in . THE TRUTH ABOUT CONTINUED USE OF DROP BOXES What's this really all about? Per Abrams video "...limits use of drop boxes, now have 300 fewer hours to use a drop box and in Fulton county, reduced from 38 to 8 drop boxes only because Republicans want to make it harder for people of color to vote." Here's the thing...she's referring to the 'Zuckerberg drop boxes', paid for with millions of Facebook dollars in the run-up to the 2020 General Election, ostensibly because post office regulated mailboxes weren't good enough. (No, it was clearly a much better idea to put in privately funded boxes .... geesh). In our opinion, they were a disaster and should be eliminated altogether. SB-202 reduces the number of drop boxes and better details security standards, making votes more secure and thereby bolstering election integrity. See the actual wording in . THE TRUTH ABOUT ACCOUNTABILITY What's this really all about? Look, this is your basic no-brainer. Accountability is a feature, not a bug. Simple. See the actual wording in . THE TRUTH ABOUT IDENTIFICATION What's this really all about? Abrams says that SB-202 puts people at risk of identity theft by requesting information to verify their identity. But the truth is, if a voter doesn’t have a driver's license or other government ID, instead they can simply provide the last four digits of their SSN. That’s it. See the actual wording in . THE TRUTH ABOUT WHO STOPPED WHAT What's this really about? Ummm... we guess she's referring to the fact that her organization and many others set up shop outside of the Georgia State Capitol during the entire legislative session, denouncing the bill day after day, screaming obscenities, , , and threatening elected officials. So, according to Abrams their presence made a difference () and 'stopped' things from occurring or not occurring, but ... they were just playing for the cameras. We could go on and on....point for point....replacing fiction with fact. Ms. Abrams has been saying a whole lot that needs correcting. And she's not the only one. . Geesh. True the Vote's mission is to empower voters with information. We hope this helps. P.S. Abrams' group Fair Fight uses as their web address. The home page quotes Abrams as saying "Georgia Republicans’ shameful efforts ... are nothing less than Jim Crow 2.0". Maybe someone should tell her who originally enacted and enforced Jim Crow laws? | | | | Legislative Updates We're excited to be working with so many groups who are ready and willing to help support Election Integrity efforts, specifically those that are playing out right now in states across the country. Case in point - ! Since Monday, AMAC Action has been engaging their advocates in Texas in support of House Bill 6, the Election Integrity Protection Act of 2021. So far, over 500 emails have been sent to members of the Texas House by AMAC members to encourage support for the bill. These efforts have now gained three new co-sponsors for H.B. 6! AMAC Action continues to push this great initiative. If you're a Texas resident, check out AMAC Action and join with hundreds of thousands of Texans who are speaking out in defense of fair and accurate elections in Texas! Do it today! Time is of the essence! | | MUST READS Coca-Cola’s new general counsel is already out, at tumultuous time Atlanta Journal-Constitution \- Coca-Cola’s top lawyer, who had made a public push to diversify the ranks of outside attorneys serving the beverage giant, is vacating the post after less than eight months amid company challenges tied to taxes and social issues. Which states gain House seats in 2022 - and which are losing out Politico \- Texas netted two new seats thanks to big population growth, while California and New York were among the seven states losing one seat apiece. Alabama Senate Delays Vote on Curbside Voting Ban Philadelphia Capital-Star \- A Democratic activist group helmed by former U.S. Attorney General Eric Holder has struck an early blow in what’s expected to be a brutal, nationwide legal battle over congressional redistricting, filing lawsuits in Pennsylvania and two other states asking the judiciary to be ready to step in if mapmakers deadlock. | "If our elections aren't truly fair, we aren't truly free." Catherine Engelbrecht, Founder and President, True the Vote Check Us Out On Insta! @ Want to see Election Integrity convos served up a whole new way? Check us out on Instagram and Facebook and let us know what you think! | | "I SUPPORT ELECTION INTEGRITY " | | | | Copyright © 2021 True the Vote, All rights reserved._

Peter,
Yesterday, I appeared on Fox News to talk about how Big Tech has increasingly become a censorship weapon for the left.

I spoke to Mark Levin to articulate my vision for how to reign Big Tech back in and cut those digital oligarchs down to size!

**Liberals could only dream of censoring conservative voices and ideas the way companies like Twitter, Facebook, and Google use their power.**

Here’s what I told Mark Levin, “The left wants Facebook to censor more. They want Twitter to censor more. They want Google to censor more. So there is a strong alliance between the left-wing in this country and these mega-corporations.”

Big Tech has weaponized censorship and undermined free speech, and it must end!

**I am leading the charge against Big Tech and mega-corporations, but I can’t do it alone.**

Donate today and help send a message to the left and their Big Tech allies— the days of your un-American partnership are numbered!

Josh

name: Jake Duesenberg
subject: We Owe It to Lisa
body:
| [ ](http://www.action4liberty.com/?e=44f3e77e3a436673570805f6f24387d1&utm_source=action4liberty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=we_owe_it_to_lisa&n=1)
---
Peter \-- What an amazing experience it was on Saturday to stand with brave patriots like Lisa Hanson in front of hundreds of people in Albert Lea. There was a resounding voice there that we must STAND UP for our rights, against Governor Walz' Unilateral Emergency Powers. Lisa is in an enormous battle with our government right now that is stealing her free time as she prepares for countless court dates. They have already showed they are willing to place her in handcuffs and make the arrest. All because she REFUSED to obey Governor Walz' unilateral orders...which are not lawful! If you caught my speech, I didn't pull any punches about what I thought of the political class that is trying to destroy her life. Unfortunately, Lisa's local Republican Rep, Peggy Bennett, is NOT willing to Stand Up for her. Peggy was supposed to speak on Saturday, but she cancelled because of the negative publicity from the media. Plus, she won't sign on to the Never Again Bill. So sad! While Rep Bennett is busy cowering to the media and far left, AND crafting Fake End Powers Bills in the House, Republicans in the Senate are busy making Deals with Democrats. We have 14 days left of the 2021 Legislative Session and Senator Paul Gazelka is meeting behind closed doors with Governor Walz, on the brink of funding his budget.
## We can't let this happen! We owe it to Lisa to make sure this Never Happens Again!
The Political Class will not fight for our freedoms UNLESS we all make them listen! It's critically important for you to reach out to your state senator and tell him or her to stop making deals with Democrats until Walz' Emergency Powers are terminated and the Never Again Bill is passed. | [](https://www.action4liberty.com/r?u=sXXfCgrOgKb9G_MAOfSoe_FkWDxdEPAXYgHTHL0X_6UbzURpL4nya4W_2u82PS17&e=44f3e77e3a436673570805f6f24387d1&utm_source=action4liberty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=we_owe_it_to_lisa&n=2 "FIND MY SENATOR") [FIND MY SENATOR](https://www.action4liberty.com/r?u=sXXfCgrOgKb9G_MAOfSoe_FkWDxdEPAXYgHTHL0X_6UbzURpL4nya4W_2u82PS17&e=44f3e77e3a436673570805f6f24387d1&utm_source=action4liberty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=we_owe_it_to_lisa&n=3)
---
Rest assured that your Action 4 Liberty is working around the clock to bring pressure on politicians in St Paul. Our phone calling team just made 20,000 calls in the last week!
**Thank you to everyone that has[pitched in to help](https://www.action4liberty.com/donate_end_walz_powers?e=44f3e77e3a436673570805f6f24387d1&utm_source=action4liberty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=we_owe_it_to_lisa&n=4)! Your donations have gone directly to our large pressure campaign. With your help, we can make sure these politicians feel the heat for the [NEXT 14 DAYS](https://www.action4liberty.com/donate_end_walz_powers?e=44f3e77e3a436673570805f6f24387d1&utm_source=action4liberty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=we_owe_it_to_lisa&n=5)!**
Let's End Walz' Emergency Powers and ensure this Never Happens Again for Lisa and the rest of Minnesota! Thank you.
**In Liberty,

**
**Jake Duesenberg**
**President, Action 4 Liberty**
Action 4 Liberty
1920 Oakcrest Ave #5
Roseville, MN 55113
Action 4 Liberty · United States

You can also keep up with Jake Duesenberg on [Facebook](https://www.action4liberty.com/r?u=27Ax0UmWOX2J8J_QwK9Z6nyVoJL5zCIi1gu8lCoYmQrA8P7rhuOjJmdy-IRmglie&e=44f3e77e3a436673570805f6f24387d1&utm_source=action4liberty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=we_owe_it_to_lisa&n=7).
